peerSet.label: Approved peer set label
peerSet.selectionBasis: Explain who approved the peer set and why these brands belong together.
caveats: Peer context is for comparison only and does not prove cannibalization, portfolio migration, or occasion substitution.
Weights guide prioritization and do not prove causality without supporting causal evidence.

trendEvidence.sourceLabel: Approved BBE multi-quarter trend significance source

caveats: Use the source significance rule; do not infer causality from movement alone.
metricReads.read: Demand Power declined significantly across the approved source period.

caveats: Trend significance comes from the approved source methodology.
Cross-source period alignment should be reviewed before using in QBR.
Use for reviewed Momentum Intelligence context only.
